elements.text:
Your friend is having a huge birthday party and most of the people in your group of friends will be there. You know you can't afford a gift for your friend.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: My friend will be embarrassed to have me as a friend because I don't have a gift.
My friend will be happy that I'm able to go.
My friend may be disappointed that I didn't bring a gift, but I'm still glad I came and showed I cared.
If people judge me for not bringing a gift, I'll still have a good time at the party.
It'll be good to see lots of my friends.
